title: Iran Found Its 'Nuclear Weapon'. Now The US Has To Adapt
summary_full: Iran's ability to throttle tanker traffic through the Hormuz acts as a strategic, nuclear-like weapon without physical destruction, and the US must find a way around this particular challenge.
summary_public: Iran's ability to throttle tanker traffic through the Hormuz acts as a strategic, nuclear-like weapon without physical destruction, and the US must find a way around this particular challenge.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran's ability to throttle tanker traffic through the Hormuz
